category_sources: Official repository README describes it as a command-line interface for managing and interacting with Weaviate vector databases.
source_facts.description says weaviate-cli is a command-line interface for managing and interacting with Weaviate.
display_name_sources: Official repository README title is Weaviate CLI.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best official documentation surface and states detailed documentation will be added later.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository weaviate/weaviate-cli is titled CLI tool for Weaviate and matches the PyPI/Homebrew package.
tags_sources: Official repository README lists collection, data management, backup, shard, and role commands for Weaviate vector databases.
source_facts.description supports CLI and Weaviate tags.
